name: persona
description: Pressure-test product ideas with evidence-grounded adversarial coverage and a clear build decision.

interface.shortDescription: Pressure-test a product idea before you build it.
interface.longDescription: Persona neutralizes founder framing, researches the status quo, samples 12 domain-specific counterpositions, and recommends Build, Test first, or Do not build.
defaultPrompt: Pressure-test my product idea and tell me whether to build it.
Find the strongest reasons my startup idea could fail.
Create a Persona decision report for this product idea.
